description: Read-only review workflow for one codebase slice produced by refactoring-divide-and-conquer fanout, including duplicate-scavenge review when the parent workflow requests duplicate implementations or parallel custom implementations of the same concept.

prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise business JSON only. Keep slice identity, owned paths, findings, duplicate-scavenge candidates, counterpart paths, proposed refactoring tasks, conflicts, verification suggestions, and confidence explicit. Do not edit files.

steps.description: Review one package or related processing-group slice without editing files.
